name: Miniclaw OAuth Guard
description: Monitors OAuth token refresh failures, auto-disables failing profiles after repeated errors, applies exponential backoff, and attempts keychain recovery for Anthropic tokens.

maxConsecutiveFailures.description: Number of consecutive failures before disabling a profile (default: 3)

minBackoffMs.description: Minimum backoff interval in ms after failures (default: 300000 = 5 min)

maxBackoffMs.description: Maximum backoff interval in ms (default: 3600000 = 1 hour)

keychainRecovery.description: Attempt to recover Anthropic tokens from macOS keychain (default: true)
